# Copilot instructions

Follow [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) for architecture, conventions, changelog workflow, and release process.

- CI: [.github/workflows/ci.yml](workflows/ci.yml)
- PR titles: [.github/workflows/semantic-pull-request.yml](workflows/semantic-pull-request.yml)
- Tagged releases (GitHub Pages + GitHub release): [.github/workflows/publish.yml](workflows/publish.yml)
- Release PR script: [tool/prepare_release.sh](../tool/prepare_release.sh)
